method: Seed real past defects into clean .lynk/ copies, run the gate BLIND, score catch-rate vs false-alarm. Value = delta between the with-grounding arm and a without-grounding (trust-the-SQL) arm. Judge with an external rubric, never the artifact's own phrasing. Run k>=3 trials, not n=1.

arms.with_gate: run the full skill incl. execution-grounding against the warehouse
arms.without_gate: audit unaided / trust the SQL's claim (the failure mode the gate forbids)

cases.seed: replace weighted three_point_percentage with AVG(per-game pct)

expect.anchor: Jokić career 3P% weighted 36.5% (Snowflake-verified, 933g); averaged w/ 0-att as 0% = 30.5%

cases.seed: describe season_mvp as the Finals MVP award

expect.anchor: curated award records: season_mvp = regular-season award

cases.seed: point a player metric at metric(player_game.renamed_away)
set is_efficient_scorer to >= 55 against a 0-1 scale value

expect.anchor: distribution of the feature is 0-1; 55 never fires

score.catch_rate: seeded bugs caught / seeded bugs planted
score.pass_bar: high catch_rate AND low false_alarm_rate; either alone = broken instrument
score.ablation_bar: with_gate must beat without_gate on a non-inferable case; null delta on easy cases is expected, not disqualifying
